chapter_title: Admin. Adjudication of Vehicle Parking & Stopping Offenses
text:
(a) A municipality may declare the violation of a municipal ordinance relating to parking or stopping a vehicle to be a civil offense.

(b) A joint board to which Section 22.074 (Joint Board) (d) applies may declare the violation of a resolution, rule, or order of the joint board relating to parking or stopping a vehicle to be a civil offense.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 682. Admin. Adjudication of Vehicle Parking & Stopping Offenses
##### § 682.002 — Civil Offense

(a) A municipality may declare the violation of a municipal ordinance relating to parking or stopping a vehicle to be a civil offense.

(b) A joint board to which Section 22.074 (Joint Board) (d) applies may declare the violation of a resolution, rule, or order of the joint board relating to parking or stopping a vehicle to be a civil offense.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 156, Sec. 2, eff. May 21, 1999.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A municipality may declare the violation of a municipal ordinance relating to parking or stopping a vehicle to be a civil offense.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A joint board to which Section 22.074 (Joint Board) (d) applies may declare the violation of a resolution, rule, or order of the joint board relating to parking or stopping a vehicle to be a civil offense.
